case_title: MARIN SOFTWARE, INC. VS. VIKARTA, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-06-2010 CONTINUED TO OCT-08-2010 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212, FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-04-2010 CONTINUED TO AUG-06-2010 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCL.
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF MARIN SOFTWARE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT VIKARTA, INC.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT VIKARTA, INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARIN SOFTWARE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VIKARTA, INC. $8,625.46 PRINCIPAL, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $797.68 INTEREST, $260.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,483.14, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-08-2010, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
